name: Koi
description: A pond of koi that sometimes dream of being whales — the 240-point outlines morph between species as the fish turn with each redraw.

code.style: --fish: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --swim: @p(@shape(fish), @shape(fish), @shape(whale)); --dir: @rand(-28deg, 28deg); --flip: @p(1, -1); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(4%, 16%); background: var(--fish); clip-path: var(--swim); transform: rotate(var(--dir)) scaleX(var(--flip)); opacity: 0.92; transition: ease 800ms; } } @random(0.14) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 8%; left: @rand(10%, 80%); top: @rand(10%, 80%); border-radius: 50%; border: 1.5px solid var(--color5); opacity: 0.5; transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
